Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: #146 Inner Drive/Michigan Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, and #148 Clarendon/Michigan Express Temporary Southbound Reroute near State/Randolph
ShortDescription: NB 146 Inner Drive/Michigan Express, 2 Hyde Park Express, & 148 Clarendon/Michigan Express buses are temp. rerouted due to police activity near State/Randolph.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #146 Inner Drive/Michigan Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, and #148 Clarendon/Michigan Express buses are temporarily rerouted via State, Randolph, Dearborn, Wacker, Michigan and over the regular route, due to police activity near State/Randolph.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #29 State Temporary Northbound Reroute near State/Randolph
ShortDescription: NB 29 State buses are temporarily rerouted via State, Randolph, Dearborn, Wacker, State and over the regular route, due to police activity near State/Randolph.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #29 State buses are temporarily rerouted via State, Randolph, Dearborn, Wacker, State and over the regular route, due to police activity near State/Randolph.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Reroute at Halsted/35th
ShortDescription: #8 Halsted buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Halsted, 31st, Wallace, 35th, Halsted & over regular route due to police activity near Halsted/35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, 31st, Wallace, 35th, Halsted and over regular route due to police activity near Halsted/35th.

Allow extra travel time.
